_NOTE_hostKey: Optional: pin the server's SSH host key fingerprint for plink batch mode.
_NOTE_hostKey2: Run: plink -batch -i key.ppk -P PORT user@host to see the fingerprint plink reports.
_NOTE_hostKey3: Format: 'ssh-ed25519 255 SHA256:xxxx...' or 'rsa2 2048 SHA256:xxxx...'  (copy exactly from plink output)
